name: markflow-tui
description: Terminal UI for the markflow workflow engine.

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && vitest --config vitest.e2e.config.ts run
scripts.test:e2e:debug: E2E_DEBUG=1 npm run build && E2E_DEBUG=1 vitest --config vitest.e2e.config.ts run
scripts.test:e2e:frames: E2E_FRAME_DIR=./test/e2e/.frames npm run build && E2E_FRAME_DIR=./test/e2e/.frames vitest --config vitest.e2e.config.ts run
